title: About This Project
description: A production-ready multilingual architecture for Next.js applications, combining react-i18next for static content and Google Cloud Translation for dynamic content.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Make multilingual web applications accessible to every developer — fast, scalable, and maintainable.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: A world where language is never a barrier to accessing information or building products.

langDemo.title: Language Switcher Components
langDemo.body: Two variants are available: a dropdown and inline buttons. Both sync the URL, cookie, localStorage, and i18next simultaneously.
